name: pcb-lens
description: Query IPC-2581 PCB layout files for physical design review
long_description:
The PCB Lens MCP Server gives AI agents the power to query and analyze PCB layouts from IPC-2581 files. Get design overviews, find component placements, and trace net routing through natural conversations.

Supports IPC-2581 XML files (RevA, RevB, RevC) exported from any compliant EDA tool.

tools.name: get_design_overview
tools.description: Get an overview of an IPC-2581 PCB design file: metadata, layer stackup, component/net counts, and section sizes

tools.name: query_components
tools.description: Find components by refdes pattern in an IPC-2581 file. Returns placement coordinates, rotation, layer, package, and BOM data.

tools.name: query_net
tools.description: Query a net by name pattern in an IPC-2581 file. Returns connected pins, routing per layer (trace widths, segment counts), and via information.
